pi_items.source: Task description (line 1 of requirements) specifies identical promotion name requirement
Task description (line 2 of requirements) specifies identical display name requirement

Drupal Commerce 2.x documentation confirms 'order_percentage_off' is the correct plugin ID for percentage off order subtotal offers. Verified via official docs at docs.drupalcommerce.org/v2/user-guide/promotions/ and GitHub source code references.

Drupal Commerce documentation confirms percentages are stored as decimal values (0.30 for 30%). Verified via docs.drupalcommerce.org/v2/developer-guide/pricing/adjustments/ and referenced code examples showing 'percentage' => '0.1' format.
Task description (requirement 5) specifies coupon code 'SPRING30'. Metadata matches task specification.
Task description (requirement 5) specifies usage limit of 50. Metadata matches task specification.
Task description (requirement 6) specifies minimum order condition of $150 or more. Metadata value of 150.00 matches this requirement.
Task description (requirement 4) explicitly states 'The promotion must require a coupon code'. Metadata boolean true matches this requirement.

Task description (requirement 7) states 'The promotion must be enabled (active)'. This is a required criterion verified by verifier.py (checks status == 1) but NOT explicitly in metadata dict as expected_*.

Task description (requirement 8) states 'must be assigned to the Urban Electronics store'. Verified by export_result.sh (checks commerce_promotion__stores WHERE stores_target_id=1) and verifier.py (checks store_assigned), but NOT explicitly in metadata dict as expected_*.

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task requiring agent configuration of a Drupal Commerce promotion. All explicit metadata claims (promotion name 'Spring Clearance 30% Off', display name '30% Off Spring Clearance', offer type 'order_percentage_off', percentage 0.30, coupon code 'SPRING30', usage limit 50, minimum order $150, require_coupon true) have been verified as consistent with task requirements and technically correct for Drupal Commerce 2.x. The offer type 'order_percentage_off' is confirmed as the correct plugin ID for percentage discounts on order subtotal. The percentage format '0.30' matches Drupal Commerce's decimal representation standard. Two additional requirements from the task description (promotion must be enabled and assigned to Urban Electronics store) are checked by the verifier but lack explicit metadata entries.
